svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="class-design" id="cls"> <mxGraphModel dx="-574" dy="-187" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="640" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="bg" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="三层各司其职：管理编排 / RAG 管线 / 向量存储" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="540" width="1020" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c1" parent="1" style="swimlane;fontStyle=1;align=center;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="KbManagementController" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="220" x="64" y="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c1a" parent="c1" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=4;" value="+ listDocuments(tenantId)
+ createDocument(dto)
+ publish(id)
+ rebuildIndex(tenantId)
+ delete(id)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="220" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c2" parent="1" style="swimlane;fontStyle=1;align=center;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="IngestService" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="220" x="314" y="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c2a" parent="c2" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=4;" value="+ ingest(KbDocument)
+ rebuild(tenantId)

- SPLITTER:
 TokenTextSplitter" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="220" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c3" parent="1" style="swimlane;fontStyle=1;align=center;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=12;" value="VectorStore «Spring AI»" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="230" x="564" y="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c3a" parent="c3" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=4;" value="+ add(chunks)
+ similaritySearch(req)
+ delete(filter)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="230" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c4" parent="1" style="swimlane;fontStyle=1;align=center;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="KbDocument" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="220" x="814" y="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c4a" parent="c4" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=4;" value="tenant_id
title / content
tags / source
status
es_indexed" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="220" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1" edge="1" parent="1" source="c1" style="endArrow=open;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.25;entryX=0;entryY=0.25;" target="c2" value="publish / rebuild"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2" edge="1" parent="1" source="c1" style="endArrow=open;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.75;entryX=0;entryY=0.75;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="c4" value="CRUD"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="339" y="242" /> <mxPoint x="339" y="360" /> <mxPoint x="789" y="360" /> <mxPoint x="789" y="242" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r3" edge="1" parent="1" source="c2" style="endArrow=open;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="c3" value="add / delete"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r4" edge="1" parent="1" source="c2" style="endArrow=open;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.9;entryX=0;entryY=0.9;" target="c4" value="标记 es_indexed"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="589" y="272" /> <mxPoint x="589" y="390" /> <mxPoint x="789" y="390" /> <mxPoint x="789" y="272" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="noteVS" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#5eead4;fillColor=#f0fdfa;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;spacingRight=10;rounded=1;" value="换向量库（如 Milvus / Qdrant）只动 VectorStore 注入层，上面两层不动 — Spring AI 抽象层换来的解耦红利" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="970" x="64" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lgd" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fillColor=#ffffff;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;rounded=1;" value="实线 = 调用 / 依赖
虚线 = 标记/反向回写
蓝 = 业务层（编排/管线）
青 = Spring AI 抽象层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="300" x="64" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
